violations.text: The hand sinks in the following areas need signage indicating when and where employees shall wash their hands: cookline by prep unit #2, first and second floor bar areas, and prep kitchen on second floor. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2026

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on cookline prep unit #1 and the 2-door reach-in refrigerator. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/14/2026

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the bar dishwasher. PIC acquired test strips from a neighboring restaurant during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2026

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. PIC acquired thermo labels from neighboring restaurant during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2026
